name: Trickstar Light Arena
name_jp: トリックスター・ライトアリーナ
desc: If you Link Summon a "Trickstar" monster: You can target 1 "Trickstar" monster in your GY that was used as its material; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Light Arena" once per turn. Once per turn: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; while this card is in the Field Zone, that Set card cannot be activated until the End Phase, and your opponent must activate it during the End Phase or else return it to the hand.
eff: If you Link Summon a "Trickstar" monster: You can target 1 "Trickstar" monster in your GY that was used as its material; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Trickstar Light Arena" once per turn. Once per turn: You can target 1 Set card in your opponent's Spell & Trap Zone; while this card is in the Field Zone, that Set card cannot be activated until the End Phase, and your opponent must activate it during the End Phase or else return it to the hand.

action: Returns from your opponent's field to your opponent's hand
Makes your opponent return from the field to the hand
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
